stemHtml: What are the meanings of the meteorological abbreviations SQ, BR, MIFG and SG respectively?

options.a: Sudden increase in wind speed lasting for at least one minute / mist / shallow fog / snowgrains
options.b: Sudden strong increase in wind speed lasting for at least one minute / haze / patches of fog / snowgrains
options.c: Short wind gust / fog / shallow fog / snowgrains
options.d: Short wind gust / mist / shallow fog / polar snow
